sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ بِلَالٌ أَنْ يُقَدِّمَ هَدِيَّةً لِمُعَلِّمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Bilal je želio pokloniti poklon svom nastavniku.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal wanted to give a gift to his teacher.

sentences.arabic: رَسَمَ صُورَةً جَمِيلَةً بِيَدِهِ وَكَتَبَ عَلَيْهَا شُكْرًا.
sentences.translation: Rukom je nacrtao lijepu sliku i na nju napisao zahvalnicu.
sentences.translationEn: He drew a beautiful picture by hand and wrote a thank you on it.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَاهَا لِلْمُعَلِّمِ أَمَامَ زُمَلَائِهِ فِي الصَّفِّ.
sentences.translation: Dao mu je to pred drugarima u razredu.
sentences.translationEn: He gave it to the teacher in front of his classmates.

sentences.arabic: ابْتَسَمَ الْمُعَلِّمُ وَقَالَ إِنَّ هَذِهِ أَجْمَلُ هَدِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nastavnik se nasmiješio i rekao da je ovo najljepši poklon.
sentences.translationEn: The teacher smiled and said this was the most beautiful gift.
